files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,6 @@ error: `tls.certfile` is required when `tls.keyfile` is set
  --> tests/operators/accept_tcp/tls/error_tls_missing_certfile.tql:6:14
   |
 6 |          tls={keyfile: "tests/operators/accept_tcp/test.yaml"} {
-  |              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 
+  |              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 
   |
   = hint: set both `tls.certfile` and `tls.keyfile`

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+error: `tls.client_ca` is only valid for server mode
+ --> tests/operators/from_tcp/tls/error_tls_client_ca_server_only.tql:6:14
+  |
+6 |          tls={client_ca: "tests/operators/from_tcp/test.yaml"} {
+  |              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 
+  |

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+error: unknown key `bogus_option` in `tls` record
+ --> tests/operators/from_tcp/tls/error_tls_invalid_option.tql:6:14
+  |
+6 |          tls={bogus_option: true} {
+  |              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 
+  |
+  = hint: valid keys are: skip_peer_verification, cacert, certfile, keyfile, min_version, ciphers, client_ca, require_client_cert
